title: AI Log Analysis & RCA Automation
description: A Copilot subagent workflow that pulls Jira tickets and related documents, filters them with team domain knowledge, runs AI-assisted log analysis, and generates RCA draft reports for customer support — reducing developer involvement in common support cases.

title: Multithreaded Server (Windows & Linux)
description: Cross-platform C++ server built to run identically on Windows and Linux, with a comprehensive suite of unit and integration tests covering both platforms. Demonstrates portable systems programming with modern C++.

title: AWS Inventory Management
description: Full-stack inventory application with Next.js/Node.js frontend, Redux state management, and AWS EC2/S3/RDS for persistence. Includes automated data synchronization and workflow automation features.

title: Portfolio Website
description: This portfolio site — built as a data-driven static site with JSON content files, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and GitHub Pages hosting. Features dark mode, scroll animations, and a timeline-style experience section.
